testcase.name: test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/the-gap-series-introduction-The gap between what companies promise and what they deliver. A series about fluffy hypocrisy, dull blades, and why the truth is now a strategy. Start here.]

test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/marketing-writes-checks-operations-cant-cash-Eight cans on the floor, a torn-up display box, and a paper towel that won't tear straight. The whole fix is a sharp blade. Nobody owns the blade.]
test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/wrap-rage-There are injury statistics. For packaging. On why the clamshell solves every problem except the one the customer has.]

test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/your-call-is-important-to-us-It's not, though. The phone tree, the chatbot, and the representative who understands your frustration and can fix absolutely nothing.]
test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/cancel-anytime-Seven steps to exercise a right described in two words. The people who wrote the promise never met the people who designed the exit.]

test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/engineering-precision-three-taps-I have no ideological commitment to knobs. I'm committed to a simpler idea: a control should be easier to use than the thing it controls.]

test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/loyalty-program-that-rewards-everyone-except-loyal-customers-I've been an Apple customer since 1987 and an Adobe customer since software came in a box. Neither has ever noticed. We're both "members."]

test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/one-company-that-got-it-right-After months of documenting the gap, fair is fair: a retailer whose promise and experience are the same thing. It isn't marketing. That's the point.]

test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/you-cant-market-a-business-that-is-operationally-unsound-Bernbach said great advertising makes a bad product fail faster. Then my wife tried to buy A4 paper. An amendment to the old adage.]
test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/cx-became-a-religion-Customer experience is the most measured and least improved discipline in business. You can't measure your way to a cure.]
test_meta_description_verbatim[/writing/ai-hasnt-made-marketing-cheaper-Forty posts a month that nobody needed to hear. What AI lacks is discernment, and discernment still costs what it always cost.]

test_meta_description_verbatim[/about/discernment-A basement in Cincinnati, a stat camera, an Ogilvy cassette set, and what four decades of craft actually teach. Gary Hopkins on where standards come from.]
test_footer_founded_2020[/connect]

failure.message: AssertionError: Footer text missing on /connect assert 'Founded 2020. More than forty years in the making.' in ' Connect — Method Method Work About Writing Connect Work About Writing Connect Connect If the fit is right, we\'re worth a conversation. Method takes on a small number of engagements. We\'re selective, not because we\'re precious about it, but because the work requires genuine depth and that depth requires real attention. Every client gets Gary directly. If you\'re a B2B firm that has outgrown your current market presence, or a growth-stage company that needs serious marketing leadership before a raise or a commercial push, reach out. The conversation starts with understanding your situation, not pitching ours. Start a conversation connect@ methodmarketinggroup.com We\'ll take it from there. Elsewhere See the Work → About Method → Read the Writing → Connect on LinkedIn → (function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement(\'script\');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:\'a14fd8183e1690bd\',t:\'MTc4MzAxODMxMA==\'};var a=document.createElement(\'script\');a.src=\'/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js\';document.getElementsByTagName(\'head\')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName(\'head\')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement(\'iframe\');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position=\'absolute\';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border=\'none\';a.style.visibility=\'hidden\';document.body.appendChild(a);if(\'loading\'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener(\'DOMContentLoaded\',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);\'loading\'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})(); '

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: Footer text missing on /connect assert 'Founded 2020. More than forty years in the making.' in ' Connect — Method Method Work About Writing Connect Work About Writing Connect Connect If the fit is right, we\'re worth a conversation. Method takes on a small number of engagements. We\'re selective, not because we\'re precious about it, but because the work requires genuine depth and that depth requires real attention. Every client gets Gary directly. If you\'re a B2B firm that has outgrown your current market presence, or a growth-stage company that needs serious marketing leadership before a raise or a commercial push, reach out. The conversation starts with understanding your situation, not pitching ours. Start a conversation connect@ methodmarketinggroup.com We\'ll take it from there.
